perksWithImages.name: I'm All Ears
perksWithImages.description: Whenever a Survivor fast-enters or fast-exits a Locker, or medium or fast-vaults within {Tunable.K16P01.ActivationRange}m of you, you see their Aura for {Tunable.K16P01.AuraRevealDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K16P01.Cooldown}s.

perksWithImages.name: Knock Out
perksWithImages.description: Whenever a Survivor drops a Pallet, for the next {Tunable.K09P01.TriggerTime}s, if they move {Tunable.K09P01.DistanceThreshold}m away from it, they gain {Tunable.K09P01.Hindered%}% {Keyword.Hindered} for {Tunable.K09P01.HinderedDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Appraisal
perksWithImages.description:
When the trial starts, you earn {Tunable.S24P01.StartingTokens} Tokens.

Spend {Tunable.S24P01.TokensPerRummage} Token to rummage an empty Chest, up to {Tunable.S24P01.MaxRummagesPerChest} times per Chest.

You rummage Chests {Tunable.S24P01.ChestSearchSpeedBonus%}% faster.

perksWithImages.name: Exultation
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever you Pallet-stun the Killer:
  • Your item rarity is upgraded to the next tier, if possible.
  • If the item was upgraded, it recharges {Tunable.S44P02.ItemRecharge%}% Charges.


Cooldown: {Tunable.S44P02.Cooldown}s.
